title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at IndiGo Cargo

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at IndiGo Cargo
jsonLd.description:
Join the IndiGo Cargo family as a Fleet Manager in Raipur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About IndiGo Cargo:
IndiGo Cargo is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in WMS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IndiGo Cargo!
